task_completion.description: Open the baseline eCRM-001 model in OpenVSP and read the specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP window shows the baseline eCRM-001 model loaded in the 3D view, and/or a text editor/terminal shows the contents of boom_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Add a new Pod or Fuselage component and rename it to include 'Boom'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP Geometry Browser, a new component (Pod or Fuselage) is listed and its name has been changed to include the word 'Boom'.

task_completion.description: Configure the boom dimensions to match the specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP component geometry window for the Boom (typically under the Design or Parm tab), the Length parameter is set to 14.0 and the Diameter (or equivalent max cross-section) is set to 1.0.

task_completion.description: Set the absolute X, Y, and Z placement coordinates of the boom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP component geometry window for the Boom (typically under the XForm tab), the Location coordinates are set to X = 12.0, Y = 8.5, and Z = 0.8.

task_completion.description: Enable the XZ-plane symmetry flag for the boom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP component geometry window for the Boom (typically under the Sym tab), the XZ symmetry checkbox is checked, and the 3D view shows the boom mirrored on both sides of the aircraft.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model as ecrm_evtol.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in OpenVSP shows the filename 'ecrm_evtol.vsp3' being saved in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/, or a file manager/terminal confirms the creation of this file.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenVSP menus, Geometry Browser, and component configuration windows rather than editing the .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D view genuinely updates to reflect the modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D workspace visually shows the new booms attached to the baseline aircraft model, confirming the parameters were actually applied.

integrity.description: The agent manually configured the model instead of copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing the specific dimensions (14.0, 1.0) and coordinates (12.0, 8.5, 0.8) into the OpenVSP input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected boom dimensions are Length = 14.0 and Diameter = 1.0. The expected spatial coordinates for the boom are X = 12.0, Y = 8.5, and Z = 0.8. The target save file is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ecrm_evtol.vsp3.
